Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}The number of Apathy Syndrome cases is down from last month, which seems to mark an end to the strange illness.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}In spite of this, surveys have shown that the public's everyday stress levels remain high.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}According to an investigation by the Ministry of Health and Welfare...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}It's hard to believe we passed the evening so quickly, even without doing anything in particular.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I suppose it's because sitting here with you all brings me back to the time we spent together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I think I know what you mean.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I have so many memories of this lounge that I find myself wanting to come back to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}It's the same for me. When I'm here, I can't help but reminisce on those days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}It's funny, since... Well, the things that happened back then weren't exactly pleasant.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I getcha on the past and all, but... Isn't there something still off about the present?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I feel like everywhere I go, I see people goofin' around like nothing else matters.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}It's like Strega's dumb ideas never got out of their heads, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I mean... Is that the kind of world we almost died to protect?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Wow, you've really grown up, Junpei-san![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I don't need to hear that from you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}It's out of our hands, I'm afraid.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}We may have prevented the Fall, but there's only so much we can do to reform society.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}...And that's all for the weather.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}At the tone, the time will be 12 AM.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Right at midnight... No way, is it the Dark Hour again!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 8 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Nah... Everything's fine out there![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}It is now March 31st. Here are the latest news reports...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Did the anchor misread the date?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Guess even the news people screw up every once in a while. Really had me going there for a second...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Weird... My phone says it's the 31st, too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}So like... It's gotta be a false alarm, yeah?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}That's... a sensible assumption to make for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Eh, it's getting late... We should probably call it a night.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}I know we wanted to say goodbye to the dorm with a bang, but not like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Um... Would it be all right if I returned to my room?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}I have preparations to make for the move tomorrow...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Oh, of course. Good night, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}I'd best contact Yukari and Akihiko... Just in case.[n]{f 1 1}
